title: Towers of the Wild Modded - Extra Towers
description: Adds more towers to the Towers of the Wild Modded mod to integrate with more modded dimensions than is supported by default.
body:
This is an addon mod for [Towers of the Wild Modded](https://modrinth.com/mod/totw-modded) that adds in more towers to integrate into more modded dimensions than is supported by default. Like its default counterpart, each tower generates with [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones) as well as [Paragliders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/paragliders)/[Hang Gliders](https://modrinth.com/mod/hang-glider) as part of its chest loot should any of those mods be installed.

**Playing with [Wraith Waystones?](https://modrinth.com/mod/fwaystones) Use this data pack: [TotWM - Extra Towers (Wraith Waystones Compatibility)](https://modrinth.com/datapack/towers-of-the-wild-modded-extra-towers-wraith-waystones-compa)**

<details>
<summary>Featured modpacks with this mod</summary>

- [Monumental Experience (Forge/NeoForge 1.20.1 & 1.21.1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/monumental-experience)
- [Fantasy MC Fabric (Fabric 1.21.1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/fantasy-minecraft-fabric)
- [Mystic's Monstrosity (Forge 1.20.1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/mystics-monstrosity)
- [Monumental Experience - In the Sky (Forge 1.20.1)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/monumental-experience-in-the-sky)

</details>

### More towers for more dimensions coming soon!
